key.name: show-notification
key.description: Show a notification with the extracted text when successful.

key.name: keep-history
key.description: Keep a history of up to 15 recent text extractions.

key.name: history-list
key.description: Array of recently extracted text strings.

key.name: enable-shortcut
key.description: Enable keyboard shortcut to trigger snap text extraction.

key.name: shortcut-trigger
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to trigger snap text extraction.
